description: You are a field robotics engineer configuring a Webots simulation for an autonomous agricultural tractor in a vineyard. Update the simulation's geographic reference frame and sensor noise models to support RTK-GPS waypoint navigation. Configure the WorldInfo node with the gpsCoordinateSystem set to "WGS84", the gpsReference set to 38.281, -122.278, 25.5 (Latitude, Longitude, Altitude), and the northDirection vector set to 0 1 0. Additionally, update the 'rtk_gps' sensor on the 'AG_TRACTOR' robot by setting its accuracy field to 0.02. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/vineyard_georeferenced.wbt.
